---
title: "Optimization_Diogo"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-27"
---

# O1 - GENETIC ALGORITM OPTIMIZATION

```{r}
library(rminer)
library(dplyr)
library(GA)
```

```{r}
# Get Data
forecast_data <- readRDS("optimization_data/forecasting.rds")
```

```{r}
# Store parameters
store_params <- data.frame(
  city = c("baltimore_multi",
           "lancaster_multi",
           "philadelphia_multi",
           "richmond_multi"),

  Fj = c(1.00, 1.05, 1.10, 1.15),
  Fx = c(1.15, 1.20, 1.15, 1.25),

  W = c(700, 730, 760, 800)
)
```

```{r}
# Forecast Data
forecast_data <- forecast_data %>%
  rename(C = predicted) %>%
  left_join(store_params, by = "city") %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    is_weekend = weekdays(date) %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday")
  ) %>%
  arrange(city, date)
```

```{r}
# Problem Dimensions
n_stores <- 4
n_days <- 7

# Each day/store has: 
# J, X, PR

n_vars <- n_stores * n_days * 3
```

```{r}
# Vector -> Matrices
decode_solution <- function(sol) {
  # Split Vector
  idx_J <- 1:(n_stores * n_days)
  
  idx_X <- (max(idx_J) + 1):
    (max(idx_J) + n_stores * n_days)
  
  idx_PR <- (max(idx_X) + 1):
    (max(idx_X) + n_stores * n_days)
  
  # Convert to Matrices
  J <- matrix(
    round(sol[idx_J]),
    nrow = n_stores,
    byrow = TRUE
  )
  
  X <- matrix(
    round(sol[idx_X]),
    nrow = n_stores,
    byrow = TRUE
  )
  
  PR <- matrix(
    sol[idx_PR],
    nrow = n_stores,
    byrow = TRUE
  )
  
  # Safety bounds
  J[J < 0] <- 0
  X[X < 0] <- 0
  
  PR[PR < 0] <- 0
  PR[PR > 0.3] <- 0.3
  
  return(list(J = J, X = X, PR = PR))
}
```

```{r}
# Evaluation Function
evaluation <- function(sol) {
  decoded <- decode_solution(sol)

  J_mat <- decoded$J
  X_mat <- decoded$X
  PR_mat <- decoded$PR

  total_profit <- 0

  cities <- unique(forecast_data$city)

  # Loop Stores
  for(s in 1:n_stores) {
    city_data <- forecast_data %>%
      filter(city == cities[s]) %>%
      arrange(date)

    weekly_profit <- 0
    # Loop Days

    for(d in 1:n_days) {
      # Forecasted Customers
      C <- city_data$C[d]

      # Decision Variables
      J <- J_mat[s, d]
      X <- X_mat[s, d]
      PR <- PR_mat[s, d]

      # Store Parameters
      Fj <- city_data$Fj[d]
      Fx <- city_data$Fx[d]

      # Assited Customers
      A <- min((7 * X) + (6 * J), C)

      # Experts first
      cx <- min(A, 7*X)
      # Remaining to Juniors
      cj <- max(0, A-cx)

      # Units Sold
      Ux <- round((Fx * 10) / log(2 - PR))
      Uj <- round((Fj * 10) / log(2 - PR))

      # Profits per Client
      Px <- round(Ux * (1 - PR) * 1.07)
      Pj <- round(Uj * (1 - PR) * 1.07)

      # Revenue
      revenue <- (cx * Px) + (cj * Pj)

      # HR Costs

      if(city_data$is_weekend[d]){

        cost_J <- 70
        cost_X <- 95

      } else {

        cost_J <- 60
        cost_X <- 80
      }

      hr_cost <- (J * cost_J) + (X * cost_X)

      # Daily profit

      daily_profit <- revenue - hr_cost

      weekly_profit <- weekly_profit + daily_profit
    }

    # Fixed weekly cost
    weekly_profit <- weekly_profit - city_data$W[1]
    total_profit <- total_profit + weekly_profit
  }

  return(total_profit)
}
```

```{r}
# Lower / Upper Bounds
lower <- c(
  # J
  rep(0, n_stores * n_days),

  # X
  rep(0, n_stores * n_days),

  # PR
  rep(0, n_stores * n_days)
)

upper <- c(
  # J
  rep(15, n_stores * n_days),

  # X
  rep(15, n_stores * n_days),

  # PR
  rep(0.30, n_stores * n_days)
)
```

```{r}
# Genetic Algorithm
ga_result <- ga(

  type = "real-valued",

  fitness = evaluation,

  lower = lower,
  upper = upper,

  popSize = 50,
  maxiter = 100,

  run = 30,

  pcrossover = 0.8,
  pmutation = 0.1,

  elitism = 2,

  seed = 123
)
```

```{r}
# Best Solution
best_solution <- ga_result@solution[1, ]

decoded_best <- decode_solution(best_solution)
```

```{r}
# Final Profit
best_profit <- evaluation(best_solution)

cat("BEST WEEKLY PROFIT\n")
cat(round(best_profit, 2), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Show Best Plan
cities <- unique(forecast_data$city)

for(s in 1:n_stores){

  cat("\n")
  cat("=====================================\n")
  cat("STORE:", cities[s], "\n")
  cat("=====================================\n")

  cat("\nJuniors:\n")
  print(decoded_best$J[s, ])

  cat("\nExperts:\n")
  print(decoded_best$X[s, ])

  cat("\nPromotions:\n")
  print(round(decoded_best$PR[s, ], 2))
}
```

```{r}
# Convergence Plot
plot(ga_result)
```

```{r}
head(ga_result@summary)
```

```{r}
tail(ga_result@summary)
```
